queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the contribution of having no checking account to increased credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of the relationship between a checking account balance below 0 DM and the reduction of credit risk.
